title: ViewerOverlayProfile
description: K3 keystone. One contract for every STING colour feed rendered on the 3D viewer (tag-compliance, model-diff, IoT twin state, CX status, QA punch, HVAC sizing). Consumed by viewer.html applyOverlay() and produced server-side by overlay builders. mode 'map' is the universal path; 'rag'/'disc' are back-compat convenience modes that reduce to the same render.

source.description: Logical feed name. Switching source auto-restores the prior overlay. Examples: compliance, diff, twin, cx, qa, hvac.

mode.description: 'map' colours each element from guidColorMap (the universal feed). 'rag'/'disc' compute colours from the elements[] array (back-compat with the original compliance heatmap).

guidColorMap.description: mode=map: IFC GlobalId -> CSS/hex colour. The canonical universal feed; any STING data source emits this.

elements.description: mode=rag|disc only: per-element flags the viewer reduces to colours.

defaultColor.description: Colour for elements present in the model but absent from the feed. null leaves their original material untouched.

opacity.description: Global overlay opacity. <1 enables transparency (e.g. ghosting deleted elements in a diff).

title.description: Legend header shown top-right in the viewer.

legend.description: Legend rows. Empty/absent removes the legend overlay.
